summary: Verified Trade Monitor countdown timer removal and simplified UI states. The old countdown timer (with seconds ticking) has been replaced with a simpler 'Trading window opens in: Xh Xm' format. Auto-entry logic is implemented to trigger when trade time passes. UI states for 'Trade Active' with 'Exit Trade' button and profit entry form are correctly implemented in code.

test_results.countdown_timer_removed: PASSED - Shows 'Trading window opens in: 1h 47m' format instead of seconds countdown
test_results.time_format_correct: PASSED - Uses 'Xh Xm' or 'X min' format, no HH:MM:SS countdown
test_results.trade_control_section: PASSED - Trade Control section displays correctly
test_results.active_signal_card: PASSED - Shows BUY MOIL10 with ×15 multiplier
test_results.todays_summary: PASSED - Shows Actual Total and P/L Diff
test_results.sound_toggle: PASSED - Sound toggle present in Trade Control
test_results.auto_entry_code_review: PASSED - Lines 260-295 implement auto-entry when tradeWindowInfo.isTradeTime || isPostTrade
test_results.trade_active_ui_code_review: PASSED - Lines 1410-1424 show 'Trade Active' with 'Exit Trade' button
test_results.profit_entry_form_code_review: PASSED - Lines 1425-1480 show profit entry form after clicking Exit Trade
test_results.missed_trade_popup_code_review: PASSED - Lines 1892-1941 implement 'Did you miss the trade?' popup

auto_entry_useEffect.description: Auto-enters trade when tradeWindowInfo.isTradeTime || isPostTrade becomes true
auto_entry_useEffect.shows_toast: Trade time has passed! Enter your profit when ready.

states: tradeEntered && !tradeEnded: Shows 'Trade Active' with 'Exit Trade' button
tradeEnded: Shows profit entry form with actual profit input
signal && !canTrade: Shows 'Trading window opens in: Xh Xm'

missed_trade_popup.trigger: Backend check via tradeAPI.getMissedTradeStatus() or local check when isPostTrade && trades_count === 0

critical_code_review_comments: Auto-entry logic correctly checks all conditions before triggering (signal exists, not already entered, not in profit entry, not missed trade checked)
UI states are mutually exclusive and cover all scenarios
Missed Trade popup correctly shows when signal is deactivated and no profit logged
localStorage persistence ensures state survives page refreshes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trade Monitor countdown timer has been removed. Current signal has trade_time of 20:00 (Asia/Manila). The auto-entry effect triggers when tradeWindowInfo indicates trade time has passed. To fully test auto-entry and 'Trade Active' state, wait until after 20:00 Manila time or modify the signal's trade_time to a past time.

cannot_verify_runtime: Auto-entry trigger (trade time is 20:00, current time was ~17:53)
'Trade Active' with 'Exit Trade' button (requires trade time to pass)
Profit entry form flow (requires clicking Exit Trade after trade is active)
Missed Trade popup (requires signal to be deactivated with no profit logged)
